title: /market-research result contract
description: Machine-readable end-of-run output. Consumed by orchestrators (e.g. /accio) to decide whether to continue a chain and to build run-level summaries.

status.description: ok = clean run; warn = partial brand coverage or known degradations; error = full batch failure or publish failure that left no usable output

signals.description: Structured tags an orchestrator should surface to the PM (e.g., failed brands, branch downgrades, synthesis gaps). Use snake_case identifiers.

artifacts.description: Every file the run produced. kind is a hint for downstream tooling.

decisions.description: Consequential internal choices. Audit trail for 'why did this land here?' Don't over-capture — only choices that would meaningfully change the output.

type.description: Categorical tag for the kind of decision (e.g., 'scope', 'branch', 'category_match', 'brand_list', 'synthesis_weighting')

confidence.description: Self-assessment of synthesis quality. Drops for many failed brands, Branch C, sparse data, implied category match, partial synthesis.

notion_page_url.description: URL of the published Market research DB entry. null when Notion publish failed (status will reflect this).
